summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Sales Dashboard after major refactoring (iteration 17). All 17 backend tests passed. Frontend tests confirm new tab structure: Salesperson sees Dashboard/Status/Earnings, Admin sees Overview/Salespeople/All Data/Email Ingest. All requested features verified working.
passed_tests: Backend: Salesperson login (Bcardarelli@fshac.com) returns role=salesperson
Backend: Admin login (Bsanchezcar@gmail.com) returns role=admin
Backend: Dashboard KPIs returns all Sales Metrics fields (closing_rate, closed_deals, total_revenue, etc.)
Backend: Dashboard KPIs returns all Earnings fields (commission_payment_count, spiff_total, spiff_breakdown)
Backend: Quick filter 'week' works correctly
Backend: Quick filter '2weeks' works correctly
Backend: Quick filter 'current_year' works correctly
Backend: Pay period filter works correctly
Backend: Admin /api/admin/comparison returns consistent totals with equipment_types and accessories
Backend: Admin /api/admin/salespeople returns user list
Backend: Salesperson blocked from admin endpoints (403)
Backend: Admin can access /api/email-ingest/config
Backend: Salesperson blocked from email-ingest config (403)
Backend: GET /api/leads returns leads with salesperson_name for admin
Backend: Followup actions endpoint working
Backend: Pay periods endpoint returns all periods
Frontend: Salesperson sees exactly 3 tabs: Dashboard, Status, Earnings
Frontend: Salesperson Dashboard shows 'Sales Metrics' with Power Rankings (NO commission details)
Frontend: Salesperson Earnings tab shows Payments, Commission Payable, SPIFF Breakdown with clickable brand cards
Frontend: Salesperson Status tab shows 'All Leads' and 'Pipeline' sub-views with 'Load Data' button
Frontend: Status tab 'Load Data' expands to show 'New Lead' and 'Import XLS' buttons
Frontend: Admin sees exactly 4 tabs: Overview, Salespeople, All Data, Email Ingest
Frontend: Admin Overview shows Company Totals, Lead Status pie chart, Equipment Revenue/Breakdown
Frontend: Admin Salespeople tab shows ranking table and User Management
Frontend: Admin Email Ingest tab shows Gmail config, IMAP settings, salesperson numbers mapping
Frontend: Edit Lead Modal has Unit Type as dropdown (not text input)
Frontend: Edit Lead Modal has Additional Phones section with +Add button
Frontend: Edit Lead Modal has 'Same Day' and 'Today' buttons for Close Date
Frontend: Edit Lead Modal has 'Pending' button for Install Date (shown as orange badge)
Frontend: Sale Conversion Modal appears when changing status to SALE
Frontend: Sale Conversion Modal shows Products Sold with Manufacturer dropdown and Model field
Frontend: Sale Conversion Modal shows Accessories section with 'Add Accessory' button
Frontend: Sale Conversion Modal shows Self Generated Yes/No toggle
Frontend: Sale Conversion Modal shows Promo Code field
Frontend: Sale Conversion Modal shows Financial Details with commission calculation
critical_code_review_comments: Good: Tab restructure successfully implemented - Salesperson: Dashboard/Status/Earnings, Admin: Overview/Salespeople/All Data/Email Ingest
Good: Dashboard now shows only Sales Metrics (no commissions) - commissions moved to Earnings tab
Good: Status tab properly combines previous Follow-ups + Data functionality
Good: Sale Conversion popup properly triggers when changing status to SALE
Good: Edit Lead modal has all requested features (unit type dropdown, additional phones, date buttons)
Good: Email Ingest tab properly secured for admin only
Good: All API endpoints returning expected data structures
seed_data_creation: No test data created - used existing leads
context_for_next_testing_agent: Major UI restructuring completed and verified. Salesperson has 3 tabs (Dashboard, Status, Earnings) - Follow-ups and Data merged into Status tab. Admin has 4 tabs (Overview, Salespeople, All Data, Email Ingest). Sale Conversion Modal triggers when converting lead to SALE status. Edit Lead modal has unit type dropdown, additional phones section, and date helper buttons (Same Day, Today, Pending). All quick filters (week, 2weeks, current_year) and pay period filters working. Email ingest config accessible only to admin.
